mapper.select: select rri.id, rri.rule_id as ruleId, rri.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, cc.id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, c.id as channelId, c.channel_name as channelName, ccc.method_code as methodCode, ccc.terminal_type as terminalType, rri.priority, rri.weight, rri.min_amount as minAmount, rri.max_amount as maxAmount, rri.status from payment_method_route_rule_item rri join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.id = rri.contract_capability_id and ccc.tenant_id = rri.tenant_id and ccc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = ccc.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = rri.tenant_id and cc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel c on c.id = cc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = rri.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 where rri.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and rri.rule_id = #{ruleId} and rri.del_flag = 0 order by rri.priority asc, rri.id asc
